proposals.title: Convert Burgandy skills to Hermes skills
proposals.description: Hermes shows 'No skills installed' but Burgandy has 15+ skills in the workspace (skills-*.md). These should be converted to Hermes skill format and installed to enable Hermes to leverage Burgandy's existing procedural knowledge.
actionable_steps: Convert each to Hermes SKILL.md format with YAML frontmatter
Create a sync script to keep skills updated
proposals.expected_benefit: Hermes gains immediate access to Burgandy's proven workflows (GitHub backup, Antigravity, Spline, etc.) without relearning.
proposals.prerequisites: Hermes CLI access, write permissions to ~/.hermes/skills/

proposals.title: Integrate Hermes into active task workflow (not just post-completion)
proposals.description: Hermes is currently 'proposal-only' and 'invoked after task completion'. This limits its value. Hermes should be integrated to provide real-time suggestions during complex tasks, especially for multi-step coding, debugging, and research tasks.
actionable_steps: Modify OpenClaw routing to allow Hermes consultation during active tasks
Define trigger conditions: when task exceeds 5 steps, encounters errors, or involves research
Create a 'hermes-consult' protocol that preserves context
Test with coding tasks and debugging scenarios
Add feedback loop to improve suggestion relevance
proposals.expected_benefit: Faster problem-solving, reduced error rates, better utilization of Hermes' learning capabilities during active work.
proposals.prerequisites: OpenClaw configuration access, testing with sample tasks

proposals.title: Synchronize Hermes memory with Burgandy MEMORY.md
proposals.description: Hermes has its own memory system while Burgandy maintains MEMORY.md. Important truths (tool calling rules, model preferences, project direction) should be synchronized to ensure consistency and avoid contradictory behavior.
actionable_steps: Create a script to parse MEMORY.md and extract key facts
Convert to Hermes memory entries using memory(action='add')
Set up periodic sync (daily or on MEMORY.md changes)
Add conflict resolution for divergent truths
Test with tool calling rules and model preferences
proposals.expected_benefit: Consistent behavior between Burgandy and Hermes, shared understanding of environment constraints and preferences.
proposals.prerequisites: Read access to MEMORY.md, Hermes memory tool permissions

metadata.context: Hermes Agent installed and wired to Burgandy workspace
metadata.source: Hermes analysis of Burgandy MEMORY.md and current setup
